text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Huh? N-no, not at all! I'm totally fine! In fact, I
was just gonna practice with my—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ah... ahaha! That's right. I was letting it dry in my
room. Let me just go get it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory must still be feeling tired from
racing. It might be a good idea to reevaluate her
race schedule.
